text:
“ドレッドエネミー”は、探索セクションに出現する、
“老練の～”と名付けられた通常より強力なボスエネミーです。

非常に危険なため、レベルや装備が不十分な場合は
逃げるか、助けを呼ぶ判断も必要です。

Dread Enemies are bosses that are stronger than normal enemies, and have "Veteran" included in their names. They appear in exploration sectors.

They are extremely dangerous, so you'll need to escape or call for help if your level or equipment is inadequate.
